2026-04-08T15:40:47.6118474Z Now I have enough information to assess the documentation gaps. Let me summarize my findings:
2026-04-08T15:40:47.6119180Z 
2026-04-08T15:40:47.6141805Z 1. **README.md** mentions `VirtualMachinesExecuteCreateFlex` in the description but the Examples section only links to generic samples — no actual code examples for any operations.
2026-04-08T15:40:48.8114871Z 2. **No `#region Snippet:` markers** exist in any of the sample test files — meaning none of the samples are wired up to appear in the README via the snippet system.
2026-04-08T15:40:51.0590410Z 3. The new `VirtualMachinesExecuteCreateFlex` operation (API version `2026-03-01-preview`) has no documentation example or snippet showing how to use it.
